channel.title: Rising Costs on The Tradewinds Brief
channel.description: Recent content in Rising Costs on The Tradewinds Brief

item.title: Bajan Brief – Bajan Bugle: Tuesday, April 14, 2026
item.description: Barbados is sending fewer farm workers to Canada, there is a gastrointestinal situation, businesses are squeezed, and the world's oil problem is everyone's problem. Tuesday's Bugle.

item.title: Bajan Bugle — Sunday, April 12, 2026
item.description: Barbados hosted a regional prison reform workshop, gastrointestinal cases are up, Canadian employers want Barbadians they already know, and rising costs have employers worried.
